creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 253844
BETA: support RISC-V 32 ESP and minor changes to original port

This patch adds devel/riscv32-esp-elf to the tree and is a satellite port of devel/xtensa-esp-elf. Also bumped the version of the crosstool-n tarballs to "_20240530" - please revert if this causes trouble.

Not solved by this patch: toolchain-wrapping for support of other ESP32 variants like ESP32s3 and further supported by the recent ESP_IDF-5.3.1.
